name: Creamy Avocado with Bacon Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and peel the avocados.
2. Mash them with a fork until smooth.
3. Add lemon juice and blend well.
4. Stir in sour cream, blending until combined.
5. Mix in bacon (or bacon bits), onion powder, hot sauce, and cucumber.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
7. Makes about 1 ¼ cups of dip.
8. Suggested dippers: Green bell pepper, bok choy, celery, pita bread, radishes, aged cheddar cheese, cheese crackers.
